pricing: pufETH vault convertToAssets(1e18) scaled to 1e36; no oracle feeds used.
notes: Pure vault-rate oracle via MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 adapter with all feed slots zeroed. Price is entirely pufETH's internal ERC4626 exchange rate (totalAssets/totalSupply). pufETH is a UUPS-upgradeable proxy (PufferVaultV5 implementation). No external oracle cross-check — fully trusts vault accounting, which derives from stETH share rate, pending Lido withdrawals, and reward deposits. LLTV is 94.5%, leaving minimal buffer against vault-rate deviations. Access managed via OZ AccessManager. No on-chain staleness concern as rate is computed atomically.
